name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Input Model

input_categories.name: Artifact Description
input_categories.purpose: Describe the evidence artifact under examination without subject judgment.
input_categories.allowed_use: Future structured description of artifact condition and observable properties.
input_categories.forbidden_use: Subject accusation, identity judgment, fake/real verdict, scoring.
input_categories.non_authorization_statement: This input category does not authorize interface, upload, storage, scoring, or verdict output.

input_categories.name: Artifact Type
input_categories.purpose: Classify artifact form (document, media, screenshot, etc.) without subject classification.
input_categories.allowed_use: Future artifact-type context for posture reasoning.
input_categories.forbidden_use: Subject type classification, fake/real labeling, scoring.
input_categories.non_authorization_statement: This input category does not authorize interface, upload, storage, scoring, or verdict output.

input_categories.name: Source Context
input_categories.purpose: Record source chain and publication path context for artifact condition reasoning.
input_categories.allowed_use: Future source confidence and traceability support.
input_categories.forbidden_use: Subject accusation, institution bad-faith claims, fake/real verdict.
input_categories.non_authorization_statement: This input category does not authorize interface, upload, storage, scoring, or verdict output.

input_categories.name: Provenance Notes
input_categories.purpose: Record origin, custody, and chain-of-record observations.
input_categories.allowed_use: Future provenance gap and posture constraint reasoning.
input_categories.forbidden_use: Authenticity certification, fake/real verdict, subject accusation.
input_categories.non_authorization_statement: This input category does not authorize interface, upload, storage, scoring, or verdict output.

input_categories.name: Claim Context
input_categories.purpose: Describe what the artifact is said to support without treating the claim as verified.
input_categories.allowed_use: Future claim-source traceability and support discipline.
input_categories.forbidden_use: Truth certification, subject accusation, fake/real verdict.
input_categories.non_authorization_statement: This input category does not authorize interface, upload, storage, scoring, or verdict output.

input_categories.name: Contextual Uncertainty
input_categories.purpose: Record uncertainty markers that constrain posture language.
input_categories.allowed_use: Future not assessable and output boundary reasoning.
input_categories.non_authorization_statement: This input category does not authorize interface, upload, storage, scoring, or verdict output.

input_categories.name: Missing Information
input_categories.purpose: Record what cannot yet be said about artifact condition.
input_categories.allowed_use: Future provenance gap and not assessable posture support.
input_categories.forbidden_use: Filling gaps with verdict language, subject accusation, scoring.
input_categories.non_authorization_statement: This input category does not authorize interface, upload, storage, scoring, or verdict output.

input_categories.name: Intended Use Context
input_categories.purpose: Record how artifact condition reasoning may be used without authorizing action.
input_categories.allowed_use: Future output boundary and escalation reasoning.
input_categories.forbidden_use: Legal, medical, financial, law-enforcement conclusions; scoring; verdicts.
input_categories.non_authorization_statement: This input category does not authorize interface, upload, storage, scoring, or verdict output.

non_authorization_statement: This input model defines governance categories only. It does not authorize interface, prototype, upload, storage, scoring, API, or public engine.
